/usr/bin/c++  -g -Wfatal-errors -Werror=uninitialized -Werror=init-self -Werror=reorder -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/TEMPLATE.exe.dir/_src/main.cpp.o -o TEMPLATE.exe  -Wl,-rpath,/app/build/external/opentelemetry-cpp external/core/libcore.a external/opentelemetry-cpp/sdk/src/trace/libopentelemetry_trace.a external/opentelemetry-cpp/exporters/ostream/libopentelemetry_exporter_ostream_span.a external/opentelemetry-cpp/exporters/otlp/libopentelemetry_exporter_otlp_http.a external/opentelemetry-cpp/exporters/otlp/libopentelemetry_otlp_recordable.a external/opentelemetry-cpp/sdk/src/trace/libopentelemetry_trace.a external/opentelemetry-cpp/sdk/src/logs/libopentelemetry_logs.a external/opentelemetry-cpp/sdk/src/metrics/libopentelemetry_metrics.a external/opentelemetry-cpp/sdk/src/resource/libopentelemetry_resources.a external/opentelemetry-cpp/exporters/otlp/libopentelemetry_exporter_otlp_http_client.a external/opentelemetry-cpp/libopentelemetry_proto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so external/opentelemetry-cpp/ext/src/http/client/curl/libopentelemetry_http_client_curl.a external/opentelemetry-cpp/sdk/src/common/libopentelemetry_common.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
